notes: Surface-deployed mining robots for bodies with significant gravity (Luna, Mercury, Ceres-class and above; minimum ~1.6 m/s²).
miner_type: large_body — requires site gravity above 1 m/s². Blocked from microgravity bodies.
mining_rate_kg_per_hr describes bulk regolith excavation and ore extraction throughput.
Multiple units on the same vessel or surface cache may be operated concurrently; rates sum.
Draws electric_mw from the ship or surface power bus during active operations.
All units are self-propelled across the surface via wheel, leg, or track drive; no separate mobility system required.
